title: Ethereum-Based dApp (MetaMask + Moralis)
desc: A decentralized application (dApp) built on the Ethereum blockchain, utilizing MetaMask for user authentication and Moralis for backend services, providing a seamless user experience for interacting with blockchain technology.

title: RHCMS: Rural Housing Construction Management System
desc: A rural housing construction management system designed to streamline project management, improve communication, and enhance transparency for rural housing projects.

title: Smart Traffic Management System
desc: A smart traffic management system designed to optimize traffic flow and reduce congestion in urban areas.

title: MeVo: Medical Voice Assistant
desc: A concept for a medical voice assistant designed to improve patient-provider communication and streamline clinical workflows.

title: High End Portfolio
desc: A High End Portfolio website design for Developer, featuring a sleek and modern design, interactive elements, and a focus on showcasing Projects & Experience.

title: Skateboard Shop Ecommerce Starter Kit
desc: An ecommerce starter kit for a skateboard shop, including a design system, backend integration, and marketing materials.
